title: decrypt_wallet_key returns plain [u8;64]; spending key not zeroized on caller drop
description: cli/src/commands.rs:decrypt_wallet_key() returns [u8;64] (not Zeroizing<[u8;64]>). Its internal Vec<u8> plaintext buffer is also unzeroized. On every wallet unlock the 64-byte ZIP-32 spending key + chain code remain in process memory until the stack frame is reclaimed. Trigger: normal wallet use (wallet send, payment). Fix: wrap return type and internal buffer in Zeroizing; same fix class as nie-kef6.103 for identity.
